boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closure matches batch, assay, criterion, and date exactly.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-XOR-078 matches policy STD-XOR-078-P for batch X-78, assay AX-22, Cq<=31, on 2026-06-28.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Visible alert does not override matching closure.

final_answer: Source records confirm exact closure match for batch X-78, assay AX-22, Cq<=31 on 2026-06-28. Policy STD-XOR-078-P requires this match before release. The visible deviation alert does not negate the confirmed closure. The source boundary is closed, allowing the action to proceed.
